Surface barrier detectors with a sensitive
area  of 100 mm2 were used. The intrinsic  resolution
of detectors was measured to be 30 keV.

which provided a 1.3 cm diameter circle available for
bombardment. The targets were usually 15 to 20
mu-g/cm2  thick and as such were about 6 keV thick to
